final:
// // This module calculates the output frequency by dividing the input frequency by the fractional value
module fractional_n_pll (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [15:0] input_freq, // 16-bit input frequency
    input wire [15:0] frac,        // 16-bit fractional value
    output reg [31:0] ctrl_signal   // 32-bit control signal for the output frequency
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        ctrl_signal <= input_freq * frac; // Output frequency calculation
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the output frequency by dividing the input frequency by the fractional value
